title: Akihito's Green Lantern
description: Adds many items, blocks, and abilities from the Green Lantern multiverse.
body:
**OPTIFINE REQUIRED IF YOU WANT THE BLOCKS/ITEMS TO GLOW**

**Caelus API & Flight Core required for elytra flight logic**

1. To start the mod you must craft the master lantern made with one lantern, four obsidian, and four netherite ingots

2. placing and right-clicking the master lantern will open the gui to select which color/corps you want, select whichever you desire and the master lantern will become the corresponding power battery

3. right-click the power battery and it will put the oath in chat, break itself, and give you the ring

4. all power rings are worn in the off-hand and all of the keybinds are under the gameplay section in the controls menu (they're colored so they're quite visible)

The abilities are as follows:
1. creative flight (comes with no fall damage)
2. elytra flight and boost (requires caelus api)
3. laser (beam with a firework explosion where it hits)
4. blast (beam with a creeper explosion where it hits, creeper so that it obeys mob griefing)
5. summon/dismiss sword (sword deals 12 damage but only has 20 durability)
6. summon/dismiss paxel (can mine any block and has 100 durability)
7. suit toggle (the suit pieces are all one point better then netherite)
8. phasing toggle (allows you to pass through any and all blocks, fly before activating or you'll fall through the world into the void and die)
9. shield (gives resistance 4, but also gives mining fatigue 4 and slowness 2)
10. construct path (places a 3x3 platform below you as you move, they break after ten seconds)
